name: Dylan Borland
profileStatus: Self-identified federal whistleblower and congressional witness
profileSummary: Former Air Force geospatial-intelligence specialist who described himself in official written testimony as a federal whistleblower and presented allegations concerning UAP programs and retaliation.
background: Former U.S. Air Force geospatial-intelligence specialist and intelligence-community professional.
inclusionNote: Included because his official House statement explicitly identifies him as a federal whistleblower and records testimony to AARO and the Intelligence Community Inspector General.

primarySourceLinks.label: Official written testimony
primarySourceLinks.sourceType: House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform
